/CAL:PROOF OF CLINIC/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYEDTO 06-02-15,/X: BAIL SET AT $40000, NO CITE/CAL:BWSTAY OF FTA PROOF OF CLINIC/DOPC/

/CAL:TRIAL/X:COURT GRANTS DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT 2 PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1385 FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDERN OF PROOF,/GTWM/CONTD:PROOF OF CLINICAL COMPLIANCE/X:SHOULD DEFENDANTSUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE REQUIREMENTS OF CLINIC BY NEXT COURT DATE OF 05-14-15, CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED,/
